options.name: -hpin
options.description: Returns hierarchical pins along with flat pins

options.name: -levels
options.description: number of gate levels to go back from a specific pin object to create the collection

options.name: -only_cells
options.description: Returns a collection only of the cells in the fanin cone

options.name: -pin_levels
options.description: number delay arcs to go back from a specific pin object to create the collection

options.name: -startpoints_only
options.description: Returns a collection only of valid start points in the fanin cone

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies 'to' objects for the collections to be returned

options.name: -trace_through
options.description: {case_disable|user_disable|all|clocks|loop_snipped|latches} Option to select tracing through disabled arcs

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies view name for which fan cone traversal is to be performed (string, optional) > <filename> # output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename> # output to file
